prose: **Pyridine frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: imported (`pyridine.xyz` from /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/), used as provided (not re-optimized). SCF converged in 10 iterations. HOMO = −7.25 eV, LUMO = −1.11 eV → frontier-orbital gap ≈ **6.13981 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap). All calculations used locoalized orbitals assuming electronic energy (bare nuclei + electrons) for fidelity tests.
